    Our Facilities

    Locate Us

    Aliganj Orthopaedic & Arthroscopy Centre

    Your Trusted Orthopedic & Joint Replacement Hospital in Lucknow

    Established in 2010, Aliganj Orthopaedic & Arthroscopy Centre is a 40-bed super-specialty hospital offering advanced orthopedic and surgical care in Lucknow, with orthopaedics, joint replacement, arthroscopy, spine surgery, and trauma care as our core specialties. We combine modern technology, internationally trained specialists, and a patient-first approach to deliver outcomes you can trust. Whether you need complex joint replacement, arthroscopy, spine surgery, fracture care, or orthopedic consultation, our experienced team is here for you.

    ​

    Aliganj Orthopaedic & Arthroscopy Centre is a super-specialty hospital in Lucknow focused on orthopaedics, joint replacement, arthroscopy, spine surgery, and trauma care. Led by experienced orthopaedic surgeons, we provide advanced treatment, modern operation theatres, physiotherapy support, and patient-first care.

    Founded & Led By

    Dr. D.P. Singh

    35+ years dedicated to orthopaedics
    | 4,000 Knee Replacements
    | 3,000 Hip Replacements
    | 1,000 Shoulder Replacements

    Fellowships: Hip Replacement (Exeter, UK), Knee Arthroscopy (Melbourne, Australia), Spine Surgery (Singapore)

    Trained under legends like Dr. K.K. Dholakia (Bombay Hospital)

    Meet Our Founder

    Orthopedic Centre of Excellence in Lucknow

    Led by one of Lucknow’s most experienced orthopaedic teams

    Advanced Orthopaedic Services

    Total Knee Replacement
    Total Hip Replacement
    Shoulder Replacement & Arthroscopy
    Knee & Shoulder Keyhole (Arthroscopic) Surgery
    Spine Surgery & Disc Procedures
    Complex Trauma & Fracture Management
    Pain Clinic & Ozone Therapy

    High Volume + Modern Infrastructure

    120–150 joint replacements per year
    ~1,800 orthopaedic, arthroscopy, trauma & spine surgeries annually
    3 advanced operation theatres with laminar flow
    Image intensifier, ventilators, high-end anaesthesia systems
    Dedicated physiotherapy & rehabilitation unit
